description_long: This is a women's slip-on flat shoe with a rounded toe and a low, contoured white sole. The upper is predominantly white and decorated with a vibrant floral pattern in shades of blue, green, and hints of yellow, giving it a fresh and summery appearance. The interior lining appears to be a soft beige or light tan material, providing comfort for the wearer. The shoe has a seamless, smooth construction with no visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing its easy-to-wear design. The sole is slightly elevated at the heel for ergonomic support and appears to be made of lightweight foam or rubber. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A white slip-on flat shoe with a colorful floral pattern and a smooth, contoured sole, designed for comfort and casual wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe and the floral pattern concentrated at the tip, with the beige interior lining visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the floral upper and the gently curved white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel area, the continuation of the floral design, and the seamless back construction.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the floral pattern and the ergonomic shape of the sole.
